heading: Short title of amendment of 1938
label: 1701a Short title of amendment of 1938
text: The , , may be cited as the “National Housing Act Amendments of 1938.”Act of February 3, 1938, ch. 1352 Stat. 8
notes: References in TextThe National Housing Act Amendments of 1938, referred to in text, enacted sections 1715a, 1715b, and 1733 of this title and amended sections 24, 1703, 1707 to 1709, 1710 to 1715, 1716, 1717, 1718, and section 1731 [see sections 433, 493, 657, 1006, and 1008 to 1010 of Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure] of this title.
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Housing Act Amendments of 1938, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.
amendments: References in TextThe National Housing Act Amendments of 1938, referred to in text, enacted sections 1715a, 1715b, and 1733 of this title and amended sections 24, 1703, 1707 to 1709, 1710 to 1715, 1716, 1717, 1718, and section 1731 [see sections 433, 493, 657, 1006, and 1008 to 1010 of Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure] of this title.
